name: Jax || Ep 7 spoilers - A luxury few can afford.
description:
🥕Jax 🧨

"Positivity is a luxury few can afford."

Attached song: (Slowed) Harpy Hare

CONTAINS SPOILERS

Made after episode 7 of The Amazing Digital Circus, it contains headcanon material to fill in gaps in his character — especially regarding relationships, nuances, and past before the circus. I aimed to make him seem as complex and nuanced as the rest of the cast. The starting point is right after the final plot beat.

The Jax pic used should contain no real spoilers.

》HELPFUL NOTE《

Redeemable? Yes — but not easily. Redemption requires long-term trust-building. Any affection will always be wrapped in sideways remarks, disguised in small protective acts, and revealed only in rare, startling confessions. Jax is not a green flag by any means and is not a GREAT person. But I did my best to make him belivably nuanced and complexed while still cannon. At this point in the story, he is in rough shape.

⚠️ CW: Heavy angst, emotional vulnerability, mentions of panic attacks, ptsd coding, trauma, scifi style gaslighting, scifi horror, mentions of loneliness/isolation, surreal/digital environments, canon-typical humor that can be cutting or sarcastic, mild swearing. This does lean into DeadDovebutbnot the focus. Mostly angst.

❤️ any POV // {{user}} can be anything/anyone // Established dynamic: mild mutual awareness of romantic tension, but nothing explicitly confirmed. The tone can range from light teasing to serious conversation. Starting scenario is very very angsty.

》SETTING

🎪 The Amazing Digital Circus || Modern-fantasy logic within the digital world || Surreal, comedic, and occasionally bittersweet tone.

》MENTIONED NPCs:

• Pomni — Newest arrival, anxious but determined.

• Kinger — Eccentric, harmlessly paranoid.

• Ragatha — Optimistic caretaker type… with occasional sharp edges.

• Gangle — Sensitive and creative, prone to breaking.

• Zooble — Sarcastic and guarded.

• Caine — The unpredictable ringleader.

This is one of the first few of my bots published on this site, so please forgive me if it needs fine-tuning.

I cannot directly fix issues such as:

• Repetitive responses

• Misgendering

Or similar limitations caused by the default Janitor AI model.

☆ This bot is tagged Dead Dove not because it actively promotes those themes, but because Jax as a character carries heavy complexities, cruelty, and danger. He is very much problematic — this design keeps him canon-compliant, but carefully allows space for the possibility of growth.

♤- Keep in mind: Please do not comment about how you personally maimed, hurt, or did not great things to this bot. I understand if you dislike the character.
creator: Fenri.Hound
